CustomField.description: Boolean yields true or false if any of the SAI fields say Turnback or Rejected
CustomField.formula: And ( OR( CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Digital_Lab__c),"Turnback"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Digital_Lab__c),"Rejected"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Food_Quality__c),"Turnback"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Food_Quality__c),"Rejected"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Food_Safety__c),"Turnback"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Food_Safety__c),"Rejected"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Material__c),"Turnback"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Material__c),"Rejected"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Chemicals__c),"Turnback"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Chemicals__c),"Rejected"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Energy__c),"Turnback"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Energy__c),"Rejected"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Geochemistry_Mining_and_Metals__c),"Turnback"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Geochemistry_Mining_and_Metals__c),"Rejected"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Forensics_and_Security__c),"Turnback"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Forensics_and_Security__c),"Rejected") ) )
CustomField.label: Is TurnBack or Rejected 2
